narrative:
Canton City 7-A (precinct in Stark County) has 364 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.7 percentage points.
